embed.title: Help
embed.description: Type `{{prefix}}help <command>` for details on any of the commands below.

fields.name: Tracking commands
fields.value:
`{{prefix}}help track` тАФ alerts for specific pokemon (IV, CP, PVP)
`{{prefix}}help raid` тАФ raid bosses at gyms
`{{prefix}}help egg` тАФ raid eggs before they hatch
`{{prefix}}help quest` тАФ field research tasks
`{{prefix}}help incident` тАФ Team Rocket, Kecleon, Showcases, gold stops
`{{prefix}}help lure` тАФ lure modules at pokestops
`{{prefix}}help nest` тАФ pokemon nest spawns
`{{prefix}}help gym` тАФ gym team changes and battles
`{{prefix}}help fort` тАФ pokestop/gym location updates
`{{prefix}}help maxbattle` тАФ dynamax/gigantamax raids

fields.name: Review and remove tracking
fields.value:
`{{prefix}}help tracked` тАФ list everything you're tracking
`{{prefix}}help untrack` тАФ remove tracking entries
`{{prefix}}help script` тАФ export your tracking as commands

fields.name: Your account and alerts
fields.value:
`{{prefix}}help poracle` тАФ register (or re-enable) your account
`{{prefix}}help area` тАФ choose which areas to receive alerts for
`{{prefix}}help location` тАФ set your home/current location
`{{prefix}}help profile` тАФ multiple tracking profiles (home/work/weekend)
`{{prefix}}help language` тАФ change bot response language
`{{prefix}}help start` / `{{prefix}}help stop` тАФ pause or resume alerts
`{{prefix}}help unregister` тАФ delete your account and all tracking

fields.name: {{#if userIsAdmin}}Admin commands{{/if}}
fields.value:
{{#if userIsAdmin}}`{{prefix}}help enable` / `{{prefix}}help disable` тАФ manage other users
`{{prefix}}help broadcast` тАФ send a message to everyone
`{{prefix}}help userlist` тАФ list registered users
`{{prefix}}help community` тАФ area-security community membership{{/if}}

fields.name: Filter syntax (applies to most tracking commands)
fields.value: All filters use `key:value` form тАФ e.g. `iv:100`, `cp:2000-3000`, `level:25-35`, `d:500`. Ranges are written `low-high` and are always preferred over separate `miniv`/`maxiv` variants тАФ easier to read and easier to change. Use `everything` as the pokemon name to match all pokemon.
